calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for an order striking claim is granted.
No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
